description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a slightly curved profile for ergonomic grip. The head of the axe is forged from metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade that tapers to a sharp edge, suitable for chopping or splitting wood. The blade is affixed to the handle using a traditional mounting style, with the metal head enveloping the top of the handle. The poll (back) of the axe head is flat and squared, allowing for use as a hammering surface. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The axe shows signs of practical design, intended for durability and effective use in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a dark wooden handle and a broad, sharp metal blade, designed for chopping and splitting tasks.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its broad metal blade and the full length of the wooden handle visible, highlighting the wedge-shaped cutting edge.
description_view_1: This view shows the axe from the top, emphasizing the thickness of the blade and the oval cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the side, displaying the full length of the handle and the profile of the blade, including the flat poll.
description_view_3: The back of the axe is visible, showing the flat poll and the grain of the wooden handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a sharp edge, flat poll, and no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head enveloping the top of the wooden handle.
